description_long: This is a rectangular, upright box of Banza Mac & Cheese made with chickpea pasta. The front of the box is bright orange with bold white and yellow text, featuring a photo of a bowl of macaroni and cheese with a spoon. The side panels display nutritional facts, cooking instructions, and product comparisons, while the back highlights the product's protein and fiber content alongside a serving suggestion image. The box is made of cardboard and is sealed, with no visible openings or transparent windows. Various icons on the side indicate dietary features such as gluten-free and high protein. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention on a grocery shelf.
description: A bright orange rectangular cardboard box of Banza Mac & Cheese, featuring bold branding and a photo of chickpea pasta on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Banza branding, product name, and a bowl of macaroni and cheese with a spoon.
description_view_1: The left side displays detailed nutritional facts and a partial view of the product image from the front.
description_view_2: The back features a serving suggestion image, product comparison chart, and cooking directions in white and yellow text.
description_view_3: The right side highlights dietary icons such as gluten-free, high protein, and more, with a partial view of the front label.
attribute_labeling: Front: Banza Mac & Cheese, Made with Chickpea Pasta, Elbows, 17g Protein, 6g Fiber; Side: Nutrition Facts, gluten-free, high protein, non-GMO, cooking directions, product comparison chart.
attribute_product_name: Banza Mac & Cheese Made with Chickpea Pasta
attribute_placement: standing upright on a flat surface
